judge_reason: Description B quotes specific stamped text ('RECEIVED', 'INTERNAL SECURITY', 'F.B.I.', dates, times, '47') and handwritten notations that Description A does not mention at all, indicating the descriptions are about different visual content.
original_image_tags: A tan or manila-colored document folder or file jacket. The surface is largely blank. The bottom portion contains several faded ink stamps, applied upside-down relative to the folder's orientation. There are two dark, irregular holes near the top edge, likely from a fastener. Some small dark marks or ink smudges are visible in the upper right corner.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A blank tan document folder cover or manila envelope with two punched holes at the top, dark smudges and scuffs, and several faded purple/green office stamps near the lower center reading “RECEIVED / INTERNATIONAL SECURITY” with dates including “22 Sep 12 AM,” “25 Sep 48 P.M.,” and “23 Sep 48.”*
